channel.title: Posts on Emiel Hoogeboom
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Emiel Hoogeboom

item.title: Beyond Single Tokens: Distilling discrete diffusion models
item.description: An explanation of Discrete Moment Matching Distillation.

item.title: How to build E(n) Equivariant Normalizing Flows, for points with features?
item.description: How to build E(n) Equivariant Normalizing Flows from our recent paper? We will discuss 1) Normalizing Flows 2) Continuous Time Normalizing Flows 3) E(n) GNNs, 4) Argmax Flows. Finally we talk about our 5) E(n) Flows. Most of these topics are tangential: if you don’t care, just read the intuition and skip it :)

item.title: Invertible Convolutions
item.description: We introduce three types of invertible convolutions: i) emerging convolutions for invertible zero-padded convolutions, ii) invertible periodic convolutions, and iii) stable and flexible 1 x 1 convolutions. convolutions
